meta.title: Barbershop The Brothers | Barber in Lelystad
meta.description: Barbershop The Brothers in Lelystad — men's haircuts, fade & skin fade, beard shaping. Book online via Fresha. ★ 5.0 from 109 Google reviews.

about.lede: At The Brothers we take the time to do it right. Every chair is a workshop — sharp fades, crisp contours, a well-groomed beard and coffee on the side.

value1.title: Sharp details
value1.desc: From contour to fade: every line must be right. We measure, check and tidy until it sits.

value2.title: Relaxed room
value2.desc: Coffee, good conversation and a chair you'll want to come back to. Nederlands, English, Polski — all welcome.

value3.title: Honest pricing
value3.desc: Clear rates, no surprises. What's on the list is what you pay at the chair.

services.lede: From a classic cut to a full Combi — every appointment gets the same care, time and finish. We use Wahl & Andis, sharp blades and products that don't dry out your hair or skin.

items.name: Men's haircut
items.desc: Classic or modern, tailored to your style and hair type.

items.name: Beard trim & shape
items.desc: Sharp lines and a groomed beard shape with a hot-towel finish.

items.name: Fade & Skin Fade
items.desc: Seamless transitions with clipper and razor, precisely finished.

items.name: Kids' haircut
items.desc: Calm and tidy cuts for young clients aged 12 and under.

items.name: Wash & style
items.desc: Freshly washed with salon-quality shampoo and styled in place.

items.name: Combi: hair + beard
items.desc: The complete look in one session — hair, beard, finish, coffee.

pricing.lede: Simple and honest. No hidden fees, no weekend surcharges. The Combi is by far the most-booked — and rightly so.
pricing.quote: Twenty extra minutes and you walk out a different person. That's the Combi — hair and beard in one sitting.
pricing.note: Prices may vary slightly with extra styling or special requests. Children up to 12 years fall under the Kids' haircut rate.

gallery.lede: A quick look at the last few weeks. More work — and the atmosphere — lives on Instagram. Tag us when you come in.

booking.lede: Fresha shows live availability and the next open slot. Prefer to message us first or double-check? WhatsApp is quicker than calling.
booking.freshaDesc: Pick your barber, your service and your time in under a minute. Confirmation straight to your inbox and a reminder the day before.
booking.whatsappDesc: Not sure which service fits, or want to ask about something out of the ordinary? Drop us a message.
booking.walkInText: No appointment? Walk right in — we nearly always make room.

reviews.lede: A small slice of the Google reviews — in Dutch, English and Polish, just like our clients.

items.text: Best haircut I've had since I moved to the Netherlands. Great place — I'll definitely be back.
items.name: M. Johnson

items.text: Welcomed with coffee, clear explanation, sharp cut. Real craftsmanship and a great atmosphere.
items.name: A. de Vries

items.text: Amazing place — super efficient and professional. The atmosphere is exceptional. Highly recommend.
items.name: K. Nowak

location.lede: Lelystad Centrum — a short walk from Lelystad Centrum station, with parking round the corner.

footer.brandTag: Sharp cuts, good vibes, always welcome. A regular's barbershop in Lelystad — for Dutch, English and Polish clients.
